name: 360° Rotating Figurine Photo Frame

description:
Your photo is UV-printed directly onto the 360° rotating figurine photo frame with a flatbed printer that lays down ink in vivid, scratch-resistant layers. We add 2 mm bleed automatically and pre-press every order to catch any quality issues before production starts. What you upload is what you get — sharper, brighter, and properly cropped.

name: WoodSnap
tagline: Your photo on real wood — warmth nothing else can replicate
description:
Your photo is UV-printed directly onto the woodsnap with a flatbed printer that lays down ink in vivid, scratch-resistant layers. Unlike sticker-based personalisation, UV printing fuses the ink with the surface — so colours stay true through years of handling and the print never lifts at the edges.

name: Yeti Mug
tagline: The corporate gift that earns daily use, not a drawer
description:
Each yeti mug is laser-engraved by hand at our Paya Lebar Square workshop. The laser burns your photo into the surface — wood, acrylic or metal — at a precision that printed designs can't match. The engraving doesn't fade, doesn't peel, and develops a quiet patina over the years that makes the piece feel even more personal.
